name: OpenRouteService
description: OpenRouteService is an open-source routing, geocoding, and spatial analysis API built on OpenStreetMap data. It provides driving/walking/cycling directions, isochrone calculations, forward and reverse geocoding, distance/duration matrices, elevation data, POI search, route optimization, and coordinate snapping.

capabilities.name: directions_geojson
capabilities.description: Calculate a route and return the result in GeoJSON format.

capabilities.name: directions_get
capabilities.description: Calculate a route between waypoints using GET with coordinates in the URL. Returns turn-by-turn directions, distance, and duration.

capabilities.name: directions_post
capabilities.description: Calculate routes with advanced options using POST. Supports waypoints, avoid areas, route preferences, and alternative routes.

capabilities.name: elevation_line
capabilities.description: Get elevation data for a line geometry (sequence of points).

capabilities.name: elevation_point
capabilities.description: Get elevation data for a single geographic point.

capabilities.name: geocode_autocomplete
capabilities.description: Type-ahead geocoding search that returns results as the user types.

capabilities.name: geocode_reverse
capabilities.description: Convert geographic coordinates into a human-readable address (reverse geocoding).

capabilities.name: geocode_search
capabilities.description: Convert an address or place name into geographic coordinates (forward geocoding).

capabilities.name: isochrones_post
capabilities.description: Calculate reachable areas from one or more locations within given time or distance limits. Returns polygon geometries.

capabilities.name: matrix_post
capabilities.description: Calculate a distance and/or duration matrix between multiple origin and destination points.

capabilities.name: optimization_solve
capabilities.description: Solve vehicle routing problems by optimizing routes through multiple jobs for one or more vehicles.

capabilities.name: pois_search
capabilities.description: Find points of interest near a location, filtered by category.

capabilities.name: snapping_post
capabilities.description: Snap coordinates to the nearest point on the road network.
